title: CL-1c Lancet interceptor

'''CL-1c Lancet interceptors''' were small, [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]]-built [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

==Characteristics==
Sleek, agile, and compact, the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]-manufactured Lancet was composed of a wingless, dart-shaped fuselage that flowed into a single prominent maneuvering fin. Its wingless design, combined with its long, sleek-finned fuselage and powerful [[Ter22 ion engine]],<ref name="SoF" /> allowed the craft to perform with impressive speed and maneuverability.

Despite its thin appearance however, the Lancet was nonetheless capable of seating two occupants back-to-back under a [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]] canopy, though only a single [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] served as crew with the second seat reserved for a passenger. It was equipped with long-distance communications equipment, a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], and a pair of medium [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]].

==History==
The primary ship of the [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the ships symbolized [[Judicial Forces/Legends|judicial authority]], and were known to strike fear into criminals by just being in the immediate vicinity. Several of these ships were used at the time of the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]. After the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] continued to be used by [[Corellian Security Force|Corsec]] and the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]].
